name: RPlog_EncountARR_in_the_Side_Deck
title: EncountARR in the Side Deck
summary: At the Side Deck, a quiet, well-appointed bar overlooking a starship repair bay on Nar Shaddaa, owner Del Marx tends to her patrons after the Hutt Lord Draga departs. The pilot Johanna, struggling miserably in unfamiliar high heels, commiserates over drinks with Del and the hard-edged Sluissi-raised arms dealer Kaitlin, while the pompous Doctor Xanatos Xavier shops for a double vibro-blade to earn more respect. The peace is tested when two swaggering pirates blow in, the Quarren captain Salty Jack and his Calamari first mate Barnacle Bill, demanding grog and trading pirate bluster. Bill's leering, lewd remarks toward the heavily armed Kaitlin nearly spark violence, drawing icy threats from her and a warning from Del, until Jack hauls his mate into line with his hook. Order restored and Corellian whiskey poured, the evening settles into amusing banter; Xavier slips out with a warning to watch the newcomers, Johanna leaves a generous tip and bids the bar farewell, and the satisfied pirates promise to return as they head off in search of further entertainment.
